## Parent

#7

## What to build

Teacher dashboard showing Sessions assigned to the logged-in Teacher. For each upcoming Session: Workshop title, datetime, location, capacity, confirmed attendee spot total, and list of Bookings with booker contact info and spot count. Read-only — no catalog editing.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Teachers see a dedicated view of their assigned upcoming Sessions
- [ ] Each Session shows confirmed Booking count and booker details (email/name where available)
- [ ] Teachers only see Sessions where they are the assigned Teacher
- [ ] Owner assigned as Session Teacher sees those Sessions here too
- [ ] Empty state when no assignments exist

## Blocked by

#2
